description: Ara operon in KEGG style: arabinose metabolism pathway (L-Arabinose → Ribulose → R5P → X5P), transport (araE), and AraC/CRP regulation of araBAD (eco gene IDs).
name: Ara Operon (KEGG-sourced)
notes: V5 = KEGG only. KEGG carbohydrate pathway; araE, araBAD (eco:b); AraC/CRP regulatory links.
mermaid:
graph TD
    ARAB[L-Arabinose]
    ARAE[eco:b00734 araE]
    ARAC[eco:b00736 araC]
    CRP[eco:b3356 crp]
    ARABAD[araBAD]
    ARA_B[eco:b00735 araB]
    ARA_A[eco:b00737 araA]
    ARA_D[eco:b00738 araD]
    RIB[L-Ribulose]
    R5P[Ribulose-5-P]
    X5P[Xylulose-5-P]
    ARAB -->|araE transport| ARAE
    ARAB -->|inducer| ARAC
    CRP -->|activate| ARABAD
    ARAC -->|repress/activate| ARABAD
    ARABAD --> ARA_B
    ARABAD --> ARA_A
    ARABAD --> ARA_D
    ARAB -->|araA| RIB
    RIB -->|araB| R5P
    R5P -->|araD| X5P
    style ARAB fill:#e74c3c,color:#fff
    style ARAE fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style ARAC fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style CRP fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style ARABAD fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style ARA_B fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style ARA_A fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style ARA_D fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style RIB fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style R5P fill:#74c0fc,color:#000
    style X5P fill:#b197fc,color:#000
scientificAccuracy: KEGG pathway and gene annotations for E. coli ara operon; araE and araBAD pathway.
